Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: Homegrown
programme.desc: Life is good for Jack, Carter and Harlan, three inept ne'r-do-wells who help run master dope-grower Malcoms flourishing marijuana plantation somewhere in northern California. But then Malcom is suddenly bumped off by a mysterious assailant, after a moment of panic, the naive trio decide to take over the business themselves. However, their lazy days on the dope farm have ill prepared them for the high-stakes game of finding buyers for millions of dollars of contraband. As they plunge into a shadowy new world of duplicity, double-dealing and danger, they soon find that they have gotten in way, way over their heads. But driven on by increasing greed and paranoia, it's too late to back out.

programme.desc: One of the 7 Natural Wonders of the World, Victoria Falls is an amazing spectacle that straddles the Zambia/Zimbabwe border. programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Back by unpopular demand, the infamous “Blah Line” returns—and it’s more brutal than ever. The contestants kick off the day with a hellish PT session that leaves bodies broken and spirits tested. Things only get rougher from there with a punishing stealth crawl over jagged rocks, grinding them down before they face Ken Shamrock’s infamous Lion’s Den training—a relentless gauntlet of pain, grit, and raw endurance. As Don Mann continues to forge a battle-ready team, the squad is thrown into breaching drills designed for high-stakes mission execution. It’s chaos, it’s calculated, and it separates the contenders from the pretenders. In the heat of the action, two standouts emerge from the ranks—earning the coveted role of designated breachers.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The day kicks off with “The 1000-Yard Shot,” and the All-Stars are put to the test bright and early. Who will “make impact” and who will fall flat? Following the competition, Don receives a call from the CIA: the mission is officially greenlit, and it’s time for the All-Stars to kick things into high gear. This moment marks a pivotal shift in their training, with lives now hanging in the balance. After a crash course in the classroom, the All-Stars head to the field for what they think is a land navigation exercise… but things quickly spiral when a group of aggressive hostiles ambushes and captures the competitors for an intense hostage training scenario. Will any of them make it out—and live to tell the tale?

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Episode 3 continues with a grueling desert run under Las Vegas’ heat, where endurance is tested to the extreme. As contestants push through, one unexpectedly stands out. They are then trained with cutting-edge weaponry, showcasing their skills on the course of fire. A high-stakes plank competition follows, with only two contestants left standing. Through intense physical and mental challenges, this episode reveals the contestants’ true character and resilience, setting the stage for more survival tests ahead.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The best of the best are back to compete, and Don’s serving up a heaping plate of his signature 10-part PRT. A bear crawl down a mountain, log running and two-point planks are just some of Don’s welcome gauntlet. And the cherry on top—a 5k desert run. But the contestants only have themselves to blame. Because when you’re already amongst the elite, you have to do whatever it takes to find the one who stands above the rest.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: With a night of torture behind them and a morning packed with PT, the All-Stars set their sights on the mission ahead. When Don introduces a 200-meter shooting evolution using Ace Precision Firearms, the group is eager—though they didn’t expect an air mattress to be part of the equation. Later, Nemo Arms ups the ante with a challenge featuring three of their firearms and a rugged desert terrain course of fire. Just as the contestants begin to wind down for the day, Olight steps in to illuminate the path to the next round of challenges.

programme.title: The Moses Diaries
programme.desc: 'Moses' captures the reality of war through his own camera, offering a raw, unfiltered perspective on the sacrifices of a Ukrainian generation fighting for freedom and a window into the grim realities of the frontline that Ukraine commanders do not want the world to see.

programme.title: Guardians of the Environment
programme.desc: Join host Philippe Cousteau Jr., grandson of legendary explorer Jacques Cousteau, as he journeys to the most spectacular places on the planet. In this episode, he unearths some of the ways scientists, students and regular citizens are working to save our Earth. From creating "safe havens" for New Zealand's endangered species, to breeding clownfish in Australia, and introducing disadvantaged kids to the wonders of the oceans, these environment guardians are doing their part to make a positive impact in the world.

programme.desc: Join host Philippe Cousteau Jr., grandson of legendary explorer Jacques Cousteau, as he journeys to the most spectacular places on the planet. In this episode, he unearths some of the ways scientists, students and regular citizens are working to save our Earth. From creating "safe havens" for New Zealand's endangered species, to breeding clownfish in Australia, and introducing disadvantaged kids to the wonders of the oceans, these environment guardians are doing their part to make a positive impact in the world.

programme.title: The Moses Diaries
programme.desc: 'Moses' captures the reality of war through his own camera, offering a raw, unfiltered perspective on the sacrifices of a Ukrainian generation fighting for freedom and a window into the grim realities of the frontline that Ukraine commanders do not want the world to see.

programme.title: Guardians of the Environment
programme.desc: Join host Philippe Cousteau Jr., grandson of legendary explorer Jacques Cousteau, as he journeys to the most spectacular places on the planet. In this episode, he unearths some of the ways scientists, students and regular citizens are working to save our Earth. From creating "safe havens" for New Zealand's endangered species, to breeding clownfish in Australia, and introducing disadvantaged kids to the wonders of the oceans, these environment guardians are doing their part to make a positive impact in the world.

programme.title: The Moses Diaries
programme.desc: 'Moses' captures the reality of war through his own camera, offering a raw, unfiltered perspective on the sacrifices of a Ukrainian generation fighting for freedom and a window into the grim realities of the frontline that Ukraine commanders do not want the world to see.

programme.title: Guardians of the Environment
programme.desc: Join host Philippe Cousteau Jr., grandson of legendary explorer Jacques Cousteau, as he journeys to the most spectacular places on the planet. In this episode, he unearths some of the ways scientists, students and regular citizens are working to save our Earth. From creating "safe havens" for New Zealand's endangered species, to breeding clownfish in Australia, and introducing disadvantaged kids to the wonders of the oceans, these environment guardians are doing their part to make a positive impact in the world.

programme.title: Guardians of the Environment
programme.desc: Join host Philippe Cousteau Jr., grandson of legendary explorer Jacques Cousteau, as he journeys to the most spectacular places on the planet. In this episode, he unearths some of the ways scientists, students and regular citizens are working to save our Earth. From creating "safe havens" for New Zealand's endangered species, to breeding clownfish in Australia, and introducing disadvantaged kids to the wonders of the oceans, these environment guardians are doing their part to make a positive impact in the world.

programme.title: The Moses Diaries
programme.desc: 'Moses' captures the reality of war through his own camera, offering a raw, unfiltered perspective on the sacrifices of a Ukrainian generation fighting for freedom and a window into the grim realities of the frontline that Ukraine commanders do not want the world to see.

programme.title: Guardians of the Environment
programme.desc: Join host Philippe Cousteau Jr., grandson of legendary explorer Jacques Cousteau, as he journeys to the most spectacular places on the planet. In this episode, he unearths some of the ways scientists, students and regular citizens are working to save our Earth. From creating "safe havens" for New Zealand's endangered species, to breeding clownfish in Australia, and introducing disadvantaged kids to the wonders of the oceans, these environment guardians are doing their part to make a positive impact in the world.
